description: The Joint component allows for a slot or object to rotate around a single point, in any direction, or around an axis. Common uses are doors, helmet tops, and dials.

fields.EditModeOnly: User can only interact with the joint in Edit Mode
fields.AllowSteal: Controls whether other users can steal the grabbable joint from other players
fields.DropOnDisable: Controls whether the user drops the joint if the object has been disabled
fields.DontDrive: Write the transforms every game tick, rather than driving it on the local machine and then sending the final value to the host.
fields.AllowOnlyPhysicalGrab: Only allow grabbing the joint with a physical interaction - remote grabs are not allowed
fields.ActiveUserFilter: How to allow or deny users from interacting with this component depending on the active user.
fields.CustomGrabCheck: A sync delegate that controls whether this object can be grabbed in certain instances.
fields._grabber: The current Grabber component grabbing this joint.
fields._holdSlot: The current slot holding this joint.
fields._pos: The current position field this is driving or influencing.
fields._rot: The current rotation field this is driving or influencing.
fields._scl: The current scale field this is driving or influencing.
fields.__legacyActiveUserRootOnly: Whether to use the legacy active user root only behavior.
fields.MaxSwing: Maximum amount the joint will Twist during rotation.
fields.MaxTwist: Maximum amount the joint will rotate in the given axis
fields.Axis: Determines which axis the joint rotates on. Is used like a vector.
fields.PositionTwistThresholdAngle: The angle at which twist will start affecting position of the slot via position twisting.
fields.VibrationAngle: The angle at which to trigger vibration.
fields.VibrationPreset: The kind and intensity of vibration to send to the grabbing controller.
fields.SnapIncrement: Snap the joint to a multiple of this angle during grabbing. Can be used to simulate "detents" on a rotary switch.
fields.SnapTime: The time it takes for the joint to lerp towards given ``SnapOrientations``. Higher the value the slower it takes
fields.SnapOnRelease: Controls whether the join snaps to given SnapOrientations
fields.SnapOrientations: A list of snap orientations that the joint can snap to.
fields.origRotation: The resting rotation of the joint.
fields.rotReference: The reference rotation, which is where the joint started.
fields.twistReference: The position to use for twist calculations
fields.usePositionTwist: Whether twist can influence the position of the joint.
